title: Copper Lighter
description:
A simple, vanilla-friendly 3D copper lighter, that replaces flint and steel.

who lights a fire with flint and steel anymore?!?
body:
![Copper Lighter!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43badf71ebff6d0719c87a8495b3bb7a1a61b2f6.png)You must use optifine or ETF for the lighter to glow!
